summary: Outstanding matrix recording captures a super‑hot 1976 performance.
review: Both reviewers who gave ratings praise the show as “super hot” and describe the matrix source as outstanding, noting the production quality is fine throughout. The limited commentary provides no specific song or band‑member highlights but overall conveys a very positive listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: High praise for both the musical performance and the matrix recording quality (5‑star reviews). With only three reviews—one of which is a non‑rating request—the overall rating reflects strong show and sound but moderate confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as an outstanding matrix recording with fine production; no specific issues mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure; reviewers simply note the show was “super hot.”
